title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, embed, list models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, multi-model, file upload, RAG, user auth) installable via Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; synchronous & async APIs, model management, streaming chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python template for retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like plugin that uses Ollama models for local code completion.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistent storage support.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Electron desktop client for chatting with Ollama models; cross-platform installer.

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Chainlit integration that turns any Ollama model into an interactive, shareable chat app in minutes.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language client for Ollama with async HTTP, streaming, and model management support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Multi-arch Docker image (CPU & CUDA) for running Ollama server inside containers with one command.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama chat, generate, embed, and pull APIs.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-chat-streamlit
summary: Streamlit app template for conversational AI powered by Ollama with session memory and theming.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration allowing Ollama models to act as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cli-tools
summary: Collection of shell scripts to bulk pull, tag, convert, and benchmark Ollama models from the command line.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET community SDK for Ollama with async chat, embeddings, and model operations; NuGet package available.

title: ollama-rustic
summary: Alternative lightweight Rust wrapper for Ollama focused on minimal dependencies and WASM compatibility.
